'''Fromish ale''' was an [[Alcohol/Legends|alcoholic]] beverage<ref name="MedStar I" /> from the [[Fromish system/Legends|Fromish system]].<ref name="Planetnamia" /> [[Leemoth]] was known to drink it.<ref name="MedStar I" />

==Appearances==
*''[[MedStar I: Battle Surgeons]]'' {{1st}}
